name: Prata
declaringWar: You are weak! The glorious Prata Kingdom marches to you demise.
attacked: From the great plains to the east, to our home cities. Our people rise to oppose your conquest!
defeated: I can feel my power fading... I am lost...
denounced: Hmph? You cant insult a king. how barbaric.
introduction: I am the great king Andeolus Laurito of Prata. Tell me, what lands do you come from..?
tradeRequest: Our two Peoples could really use some agreement...

name: Shimang
declaringWar: Charge! Victory is only one glorious battle away!
attacked: You cannot declare war on me! I declared war first..!
defeated: Good... End me and give me honour...
introduction: Good evening, who are you? For I am the leader of Shimang.
tradeRequest: Gold? Iron? Weapons? Who knows what things we can get from this trade?

name: Alqadima
declaringWar: The stars shine bright, this is an omen from the Gods... We shall win the world!
attacked: You cannot erase our people. Our pillars have stood longer than your puny civilization.
defeated: A terrible day... Our people return to ashes, just like the desert dunes...
denounced: I am in shock! May the Gods curse your people.
introduction: A meeting blessed by God, I am sure... I am the greatest Alqadimanite queen to ever grace this earth.
tradeRequest: Will you accept our trade request?
